steps.title: Use the reliability clue
steps.content: The sentence contrasts small sample sizes with more than 8,000 ratings. The blank must describe a number large enough to make the average rating trustworthy.

steps.title: Choose the sufficient word
steps.content: Choice A means more than needed, which the passage does not claim. Choice C describes correctness, not quantity. Choice D means not enough, the opposite of the reliability claim. The needed word means sufficient. The answer is B.
